description: Check public Lab and protected MCP proxy endpoints from caller-visible URLs. Probes: app health, protected-resource metadata, OAuth bearer challenge, wrong-path 404 behavior, and (when backend_url is provided) backend-leak redaction.

params.name: app_url
params.description: Public Lab app URL, e.g. https://lab.example.com

params.name: mcp_url
params.description: Public MCP gateway URL, e.g. https://mcp.example.com

params.name: route
params.description: Protected MCP public route path, e.g. /telemetry

params.name: backend_url
params.description: Optional private backend origin, e.g. http://mcp-backend:3100. When provided, enables the backend-leak redaction probe.

description: Add a gateway and reconcile runtime state

params.name: spec
params.description: Gateway config payload to persist. TRUST BOUNDARY: when `command` is set (stdio transport), the gateway will spawn that command as a local subprocess with labby's full process environment. Only operators with admin access may call this action; the command and its arguments are validated against a spawn allowlist before being persisted, but callers must treat this as an admin-level code-execution primitive.

params.name: bearer_token_value
params.description: Write-only: raw bearer token to store securely. Never returned on reads. If bearer_token_env is omitted from the spec, a default env var name is derived from the gateway name.

params.name: timeout_ms

params.name: max_response_bytes
params.description: Maximum serialized response envelope size

params.name: max_response_tokens

params.name: token_estimate_divisor
params.description: Byte-to-token divisor used by response limiting

params.name: max_log_entries
params.description: Maximum captured console log lines per execution

params.name: max_log_bytes
params.description: Maximum captured console log bytes per execution

params.description: Client kind that originated the import (e.g. "cursor", "vscode"). Use to disambiguate when multiple tombstones share the same name.

params.description: Path of the client config file the server was imported from. Use to disambiguate when multiple tombstones share the same name.

params.name: server_name
params.description: Server name as it appeared in the source client config. Use to disambiguate when the gateway name differs from the original config key.

params.name: transport_fingerprint
params.description: Stable SHA-256 hash of the transport target (URL for HTTP, command+args for stdio). Use to uniquely identify the tombstone when name alone is ambiguous.
